title: Create Dual-Mode Manifest Executor
description: Generate package.json files for dual-mode (ESM + CJS) package support with main, module, typings, and sideEffects fields

outputDir.description: Base output directory where package.json files will be created (e.g., './artifacts/transpiled-esm-npm')

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from processing (matched against relative path from esmDir)

generatedDtsFiles.description: List of generated .d.ts files that don't exist in srcDir but are generated during build (paths relative to srcDir)
